title: Are there plans for adding FILE integration between TypeForm and monday?
excerpt: The TypeForm inregration works great for most board columns … but there is one column in particular that is keeping us from using the integration: the FILE column.   We are needing the ability to pass a photo captured  i…

posts.author: Travis_Etzler (Travis Etzler)
posts.cookedHtml: The TypeForm inregration works great for most board columns … but there is one column in particular that is keeping us from using the integration: the FILE column. We are needing the ability to pass a photo captured in TypeForm into a Monday board FILE column. It appears this is currently not possible. We require screenshot and/or photo capture within all forms , so if we cant pass these TypeForm files into Monday boards, the integration is useless. Any plans to add this functionality? If so, Any idea how far out it may be? Thanks!
